E7: adversarially verify the load-bearing dispatch cards (D001, D002, D003, D005, D007), which are currently provisional direct extractions per the caveats standing rule and carry every dispatch argument on both sides.

result.optimizerRole: The optimizer does not need source-level type inference or implicit conversions; it needs the facts they would deliver, and the corpus shows the channel is fungible while explicit declaration is the only channel with no recovery machinery. J001 (information demand constant, only the channel differs), J002 (speculative channels buy guard/invalidation machinery), and J003 (stable layout is the optimizer-relevant property; static languages could guarantee it) establish that declared facts dominate recovered facts. D001's monomorphization consumes declared concrete types directly; F001/F002 non-interference facts are the corpus's best-attested enablers and originate as checked declarations plus compiler proof, not writer-elided guesses. D009/D010 show the flagship inference-for-performance design (Julia) recovers performance only conditionally and fails silently into dynamic dispatch — the exact guarantee-vs-conditional-recovery asymmetry the corpus repeatedly confirms (F007, dispatch-generics verdict: guaranteed static specialization as the core's only implicit path). Implicit conversions are worse than useless to the optimizer: under N001/N002, conversions move values between definedness classes and mode contracts, so an implicitly inserted conversion silently decides which optimization promise (nsw-grade, poison-bearing) applies — a contract the writer never stated. Critical scoping preserved from the prosecution: sound below-source derivation of ADDITIONAL facts (known-bits, ranges, flow-sensitive exclusivity spans finer than binding granularity per F002, alias refinement) stays in the optimizer and is not the accused feature; this scoping also absorbs the defense's F002 granularity objection, which otherwise attacked a strawman.
result.verificationRole: Verification is where the cut earns its place, but the defense's checked-vs-trusted dilemma lands and becomes a binding requirement rather than a keep. (a) Annotations must be CHECKED, never trusted: F003/N002/N004 show the fact channels are UB/poison-bearing contracts; misleading-comparisons note 5 says metadata is sound only if frontend proofs are sound; the violation-semantics post-critique convergence is 'proven facts assumable everywhere, unproven assertion never ambient.' A fallible AI writer's annotation is an unproven assertion, so UB-bearing annotations (noalias-grade, nsw-grade, range) are proof-gated or conservatively dropped — full annotation does NOT mean annotate-and-trust. (b) The defense is correct that checking requires a derivation engine; but with total annotation the engine is a syntax-directed local checker computing each expression's type bottom-up from declared leaves and comparing against declared facts — no unification variables, no defaulting, no policy choice, no determination of writer intent. That checker is the prosecution's scoped-in component and fits the corpus's model of trustworthy compilation (N006: small, mechanically checkable, Alive2-style verifiable rules); an intent-reconstruction solver has no such oracle, because nothing can verify a guess of intent, only its internal consistency. (c) Every fact having a declaring token converts the charter's named hazard — consistency drift across near-duplicates — from silent semantic divergence (inference quietly assigns each copy its own types; both compile) into a local, machine-readable compile error. Residual risk both parties concede: internally consistent-but-wrong annotation sets still type-check; redundancy gives cross-checking purchase that elision removes, but the catch-rate is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED.
result.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer behavioral claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence — so this ledger is priced analytically. Costs the verdict accepts: annotation token inflation at every binding and call (charter-payable verbosity; annotations are mechanically derivable from signatures, so tooling, not the writer's judgment, should produce them); context-window pressure from longer functions, with an unmeasured second-order hallucination risk; refactor fanout where one signature change forces edits at every use site (each edit local, mechanically derivable); higher compile-fix cycle counts, though each error is local, token-anchored, and machine-readable — plausibly the cheapest error class for automated repair (untested). Costs the verdict avoids: the single-token hallucination (0 vs 0.0) silently retyping an entire inference region while still compiling; implicit conversions laundering a type-mismatch hallucination into compiling-but-wrong code with changed numeric mode (N002-grade contract switch); non-local inference diagnostics reported far from cause; and the defense's own observation that implicit conversions make textually identical near-duplicates semantically divergent via different conversion paths. Costs the defense proved and the language must now engineer away (see whatMustBeTrue): O(uses) diagnostic cascades from one wrong signature, drift across regenerated near-identical annotation blocks, and the generation fixpoint (types unwritable without running the compiler) — the last is eliminated by the nameability requirement, since compositional writer-chosen names are writable a priori. The defense's O(n^2) combinator-chain source-growth claim is analytic, unmeasured, and the single strongest reason to run the follow-up experiments before freezing annotation density.
whatMustBeTrue: Nameability guarantee: every type, effect row, layout, and mode the language can construct has a canonical, finite, writable surface name available WITHOUT running the compiler — closures are lambda-lifted to named top-level items with explicit environment structs, generic instantiations are nameable via explicit instantiation syntax, and the core has no anonymous or opaque/existential 'compiler-fills-this-in' annotation. This is the load-bearing repair to the defense's dilemma: without it, mandatory annotation forces D002-style boxing (prevents inlining) or D009-style function-typed indirection, or readmits inference under another name, and the verdict fails.

Checked, never trusted: the compiler independently verifies every annotation against a truthful lowering table; UB/poison-bearing contract annotations (F003 noalias-grade, N002 nsw-grade, N004 range-grade) are assumable by the optimizer only when compiler-proven, with conservative fallback otherwise — per the violation-semantics convergence that unproven assertion is never ambient. 'Full annotation' is a redundancy-and-checking regime, not a trust regime.

Below-source fact derivation stays: the optimizer retains sound analysis deriving additional facts (known-bits, ranges, flow-sensitive exclusivity spans finer than binding granularity per F002) so binding-granularity annotation does not cap optimization precision; this derivation determines no source semantics.

No implicit value-changing conversions anywhere: every conversion that can change value, representation, precision, or numeric mode is a named explicit operator with truthful lowering (numeric-semantics leading candidate); bare literals without a declared mode are a hard error, not defaulted. At most, statically checked coercions that are provably representation- and value-identical (lowering no-ops, e.g. exclusive-to-shared reference weakening) may be implicit; anything stronger is out.

Consistency-checking of repeated code, as machinery the language/toolchain must provide: a canonical normal form for annotated code plus content-addressed or dedup checking so near-duplicate annotation blocks either collapse into one named definition or drift loudly as diagnostics; this addresses both residual drift channels the parties agree survive (internally-consistent wrong copies, systematic template copying) — EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED how much it recovers.

Root-cause diagnostics: machine-readable, declaring-token-anchored errors with provenance chains and deduplication so one wrong signature yields one root diagnostic, not O(uses) cascade noise flooding the repair loop — the defense's cascade attack is conceded and becomes a requirement.

Mechanical annotation tooling outside the core: annotations are derivable and insertable by tools from signatures and the lowering table, so the AI writer emits or repairs them without free-form guessing; interface changes propagate mechanically.

Separate-compilation firewall: fully annotated signatures are fixed compilation boundaries (D004); no fact needed to check one body ever depends on another body, keeping checking local, parallel, and incremental in the AI iteration loop.

Defeasance clause: if the follow-up experiments show full per-binding annotation measurably raises net writer error rates or context-window failure versus signature-anchored policy-free propagation, the narrow relaxation to reconsider is exactly the defense's residue — deterministic, policy-free, ambiguity-is-error propagation inside bodies from mandatory signature anchors — reintroduced as a surface abbreviation over the same checked semantics, never as solver-decided intent, never crossing signatures, and never touching conversions.
result.rationale: The two accused mechanisms fail differently, and most of the territory is decidable now. (1) Implicit value-changing conversions: cut, unanimously and decisively. The defense concedes them entirely; the prosecution's hazard structure is carded (N001 definedness lattice, N002 overflow-as-poison contracts); and the numeric-semantics record shows zero evidentiary support for any implicit-conversion design ('all mixed-mode conversion rules are invention') while its leading candidate is named, truthfully-lowered explicit modes. Under the null hypothesis this is the easiest call in the case. (2) Whole-program/global/cross-signature inference: cut, also effectively unanimous — the defense conceded it, and D004 (boundary coupling), D009/D010 (silent conditional recovery), and F007's guarantee-vs-conditional asymmetry support the prosecution. (3) The genuinely contested strip is narrow: whether body-local bindings may elide annotations under deterministic, policy-free propagation from mandatory signature anchors. Here I find for the prosecution on the law but for the defense on two facts. On the law: the null hypothesis puts the burden on the defense, whose positive case for elision rests entirely on EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED machine-writer claims (its own list says so), and whose F009/SIL citation is architectural precedent for compiler-managed IR facts, not for surface elision; meanwhile its F002 granularity leg attacks a strawman the prosecution had already scoped out (below-source analysis stays). The prosecution's silent-cliff cards (D009, F007) admittedly do not reach the conceded-down residue — policy-free inference with ambiguity-as-hard-error has no silent fallback — but 'the attack misses' is not affirmative evidence for keeping, and the corpus contains none. On the facts: the defense proved two things that convert cut_from_core into replace_with_alternative. First, the checked-vs-trusted dilemma is real — annotate-and-trust would institutionalize unsound frontend metadata emission (F003, N002, N004, misleading-comparisons note 5, violation-semantics convergence), so the alternative is binding only as a checked-redundancy regime with a syntax-directed local checker in the core. Second, the unnameable-types attack lands against the alternative as literally stated: with anonymous closure and instantiation types, 'annotate every binding' is either performance-lossy on carded costs (D002, D009) or self-refuting via opaque annotations. But this dilemma has a third horn the language can be required to build: guaranteed nameability (lambda-lifting, explicit environment structs, nameable instantiations) — verbose, charter-payable, and it simultaneously dissolves the defense's generation-fixpoint argument. Because the alternative carries the load only if the language affirmatively provides nameability, consistency-checking of repeated code, root-cause diagnostics, and mechanical annotation tooling, the correct verdict is replace_with_alternative rather than a bare cut. Honesty constraint: both parties' load-bearing D-cards (D001, D002, D009) are provisional direct extractions not yet adversarially verified (caveats.md standing rule; round1-index common gaps), all AI-writer behavioral claims are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED, and the corpus quantifies no compile-time or code-size magnitudes anywhere — so the verdict carries an explicit defeasance clause tied to the named experiments rather than pretending the annotation-density question is settled.
followUps: AI-codegen A/B experiment (the decisive one): generate a matched task corpus under (a) full per-binding annotation with nameability and (b) mandatory signatures plus policy-free body propagation; measure hallucination/drift rates across near-duplicates, compile-fix cycles to green, automated-repair success from diagnostics, and token/context cost on generation and re-read. Triggers the defeasance clause if (b) wins on net error rate.

Redundancy-as-cross-check experiment: inject known writer errors and measure the rate redundant annotations catch them versus new errors introduced by generating the extra annotation tokens — the cross-check-vs-doubling question both parties flag as untested.

Nameability prototype and token audit: verify lambda-lifting plus explicit instantiation naming covers all D001-class monomorphized intermediates and closures without D002-style boxing, and measure actual source growth in adapter/combinator chains (the O(n^2) claim is analytic, unmeasured).

Compile-time measurement at scale: syntax-directed checking of fully annotated large AI-generated sources versus policy-free local inference, including pathological function sizes — the corpus has zero compile-time quantification (D001/D004 negative scopes, caveats.md).

Fourth fact channel study (from the numeric-semantics record, uncarded in both directions): how much nsw/known-bits/range-grade optimization the compiler soundly derives from declared types and dominating guards with no extra frontend flags — bounds how much mode annotation the optimizer actually needs and reprices the annotation burden.

Diagnostic engineering prototype: provenance-chain, root-cause-deduplicated machine-readable diagnostics for annotation mismatch; measure whether they hold repair-loop cost at O(1) per root fault versus O(uses) cascades.
Adversarial verification of the load-bearing provisional cards D001, D002, D009 (and D004, D010) per the caveats.md standing rule — both sides built on unverified direct extractions.

Rule on the representation-identical coercion boundary explicitly (e.g., exclusive-to-shared weakening): specify the proof obligation that a coercion is a lowering no-op, or cut even these for uniformity.
